text.message: not sure i even get that from a game prespective
u have no wheat and you made the port week
where would you have gone if you were me

5-8-9-10 all sheep spot 3:1 wayyyy more valuable than a 9-10 wood port

you dont need roads you have all the ore

then beg for it every turn
doesnt help me develop one bit
kamikaze us both with horrid placement
u say u have 4 we want proof
then just give win to green then
my flimsy longest road gonna cost me
now im out, cant do much from now on, you fight him
then secure road, you have all you need
im not taking road, you take road
we are where we are becous of my knights, you would have won 10 times over by now

no hording of one resource boys! red has monopoly
